name: Chicken Seasoning Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Stir until well mixed.
3. Transfer the mixture to a tightly covered glass jar.
4. Use as needed when seasoning poultry dishes.
5. Remember not to add additional salt to the dish.
6. This seasoning mix is versatile and can be used for other purposes as desired. Approximately 4 calories per teaspoon.
